title: Protein Thermostability Mutation Prediction

target.name: dTm
target.description: Measured change in melting temperature in degrees C for a single-point mutation.

feature_descriptions.protein_id: UniProt or PDB identifier for the wild-type protein.
feature_descriptions.sequence: Wild-type amino-acid sequence in one-letter code.
feature_descriptions.position: One-indexed residue position of the mutation.
feature_descriptions.wt_aa: Wild-type amino acid at the mutation position.
feature_descriptions.dTm: Training label: change in melting temperature in degrees C.

domain_background: Protein-cold thermostability prediction. Test proteins are absent from training.
allowed_external_resources: Use public scientific databases, package documentation, and pretrained protein models. Do not use hidden labels or scorer files.
